purpose: Fried food suspended mid-air with sauce splashing 360 degrees.

background_treatment.description: Background color or tone direction (resolved from brand fingerprint if not provided)

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Dynamic food photography of {food_item} pieces suspended mid-air with splash of glossy {sauce_color} sauce frozen around them at 1/8000 shutter, fresh ingredients lettuce and {accent_ingredient} dispersed in motion, scattered sesame seeds and herb fragments suspended, vivid {background_color} gradient backdrop, warm directional key light from upper right hitting food highlights, shot on 100mm macro at f/8, mouthwatering, no text, no plates, no hands {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: launch, grow, harvest. Source code in research corpus: T05. Saudi adaptation guidance: Highly performant for Saudi QSR — especially broasted chicken. For shawarma, replace 'lettuce' with 'shawarma garlic toum and pickled vegetables'. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1-2 per week.
